title.rendered: Dear Lottery Result Today 6 PM | 22 June 2026

content.rendered:
Are you interested in checking the dear lottery result today 6 PM? You’ve come to the right place! We regularly update the results for all Nagaland State Lottery draws, including the morning, night, and evening ones, on this website every day, at the scheduled time.

The dear lottery result today 6 PM comes with a 1st prize of 1 crore, a 2nd Prize of 9000 Rupees, a 3rd Prize of 450 Rupees, a 4th Prize of 250 Rupees, and a 5th Prize of 120 Rupees. Nagaland State Lottery has released the results for today’s 6 PM draw, and you can find them below.

1:00 PM RESULT
6:00 PM RESULT
8:00 PM RESULT

Dear Lottery Result Today 6 PM

Dear Morning 6:00 PM Tickets

Dear Morning 6:00 PM Prize
